education.degree: Information Technology - Computer Networks and Data Communication

experience.description: Designed and developed a gym system. Implemented Front-End with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Back-End with C#, .NET Core, MVC. Managed SQL Server database, applied MVC architecture, optimized SEO, and ensured website security through debugging and testing.

Configured and managed SharePoint Server. Performed network system configuration, Active Directory account creation, SQL Server and SharePoint Server installation, and managed permissions and security settings.
Designed and secured WiFi networks for SMEs. Implemented network diagrams, security solutions, DHCP, VLAN, ACL, WLC, WPA2/WPA3, and ASA firewall configurations.
